name: Radio City Deco
description: Radio City Music Hall at night. Art deco vertical neon signage against a deep dark urban canyon, electric red and blue neon glow, warm amber storefronts along 6th Avenue. Theatrical, not glamorous — neon tubes over gold leaf.
source: Radio City Music Hall neon signage, 6th Avenue Manhattan at night, 1930s theater district neon

demo.title: RADIO CITY
demo.subtitle: The Showplace of the Nation — Est. 1932
demo.banner: Holiday Spectacular — Tickets On Sale Now

suggestions.icons: Lucide (stroke 1.5px, with neon glow on active states)
suggestions.components: vertical neon text, art deco chevron dividers, glass-morphism panels, neon-bordered cards, marquee banners, geometric deco accents (vertical lines, fan motifs), glow buttons
suggestions.avoid: bright white backgrounds, gold/champagne tones (use art-deco theme instead), rounded pill shapes everywhere, playful or casual typography, warm cozy palettes
suggestions.texture: subtle noise on dark bg, glass-blur backdrop-filter on surfaces, vertical neon line accents
